title: Level 1: The tempting tennis tale of Chelsea's common cracking cutting-edge memories.
description:
Gametype: 2v2 Doubles Tourney
Round: 1 of 6
Sploltoen + CorruptionSound Vs SuperKoffee + GameBop

Special Conditions:
+ Video Time: 0:30 - 3:00
+ Opponents must respond with next round within 4 days
+ Rounds 5 and 6 are collabs from the two players; must respond within 5 days and can be up to 4 minutes

Sources Used:
+ [S2][P5] Quake 2 [HTSF]
+ Wombat vs Gemini - Q3Test 1999 Finals p1 
+ Quake done Quick - With a vengence
+ Chelsea 1-0 FC Barcelona - Chelsea goal by Michael Ballack
+ Chelsea 3-0 Man Utd - Match highlight
+ Aresnal 1-1 Chelsea - Chelsea equaliser by Hernen Crespo
+ Chelsea 1-0 Portsmouth - FA cup final match highlight
+ DHW09, QuakeWorld Final At DreamArena
+ Ronbob vs Sslasher 2 - Doom 2 1996 Tournament
+ Quake 3 logo

Audio Used:
Elysis - Thru the mirror

Other applications used:
+ None

Notes:
+ Doubles Tourney = Double the fun = Serve = PROFIT!
+ And sorry for the poor quality, I couldn't export the video out to HD as Sony Vegas kept on crashing in the middle of rendering.

Video: 640x360 10Mbps AVC1 30fps
Audio: 192kbps 48000Hz Stereo
Last Re-record count: 1095
